final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) count <= 5'b00001;
        else count <= {count[3:0], count[4]};
    end

endmodule
